publishedAbstract: HEALTH_WARN "MDS cache is too large (xGB/yGB); 0 inodes in use by clients, 0 stray files" for the standby-replay MDS. MDS reports oversized cache while checking `ceph health detail`: ``` HEALTH_WARN 1 MDSs report oversized cache [WRN] MDS_CACHE_OVERSIZED: 1 MDSs report oversized cache mds.ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-b(mds.0): MDS cache is too large (6GB/4GB); 0 inodes in use by clients, 0 stray files ```
publishedTitle: Ceph: HEALTH_WARN "MDS cache is too large (xGB/yGB); 0 inodes in use by clients, 0 stray files" for the standby-replay MDS
